intro: Cyathula sequax, also known as the Sequax Cyathula or Purple Cyathula, is a type of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Cyathula sequax include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal effects.
